sections.paragraph:
Original: מומכן ממוּכן o

Transliteration: memûkân mômûkân

Phonetic: mem-oo-kawn'

BDB Definition:

Memucan = "dignified"
  1. one of the 7 princes of Persia in the reign of Ahasuerus

Origin: of Persian derivation

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Masculine
